ddls:
CREATE TABLE "declarations" (
  "declaration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each declaration */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the declaration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the declaration */,
  "registered" TEXT /* Date and details of registration */,
  "register_id" TEXT /* Unique registration ID for the declaration */,
  "comp_number" TEXT /* Compliance number (if applicable) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the declaration's validity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the declaration's validity */,
  "incorporating_amendments" TEXT /* Details of the latest incorporated amendments */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of declaration */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the declaration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the declaration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the declaration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the declaration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("declaration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_declarations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES declaration_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_declarations_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES declaration_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "declaration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the declaration being amended */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the amendment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the amendment */,
  "registered" TEXT /* Date and details of registration for the amendment */,
  "register_id" TEXT /* Unique registration ID for the amendment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the amendment's validity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the amendment's validity */,
  "incorporating_amendments" TEXT /* Details of any further incorporated amendments */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of amendment */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the amendment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the amendment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the amendment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the amendment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_declaration_id FOREIGN KEY ("declaration_id") REFERENCES declarations ("declaration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES amendment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES declaration_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "declaration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "declaration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the declaration */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the version */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_declaration_versions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES declaration_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_declaration_versions_declaration_id FOREIGN KEY ("declaration_id") REFERENCES declarations ("declaration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the declaration or amendment */,
  "declaration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the declaration being accessed */,
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amendment being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the declaration or amendment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_amendment_id FOREIGN KEY ("amendment_id") REFERENCES amendments ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_declaration_id FOREIGN KEY ("declaration_id") REFERENCES declarations ("declaration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "declaration_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Superseded) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Registrar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "declaration_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the declaration type (e.g., AAED, PSSAP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the declaration type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the amendment type (e.g., Exclusion, Inclusion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
